item.title: KREMLIN: ON ONE SIDE, THERE IS RUSSIA. ON THE OTHER SIDE, THERE IS UKRAINE, TOGETHER WITH A NUMBER OF EUROPEAN COUNTRIES AND THE UNITED STATES, SUPPLYING UKRAINE WITH MILLIONS OF TONS OF WEAPONS. IT I
item.description: pKREMLIN:br /br /ON ONE SIDE, THERE IS RUSSIA. ON THE OTHER SIDE, THERE IS UKRAINE, TOGETHER WITH A NUMBER OF EUROPEAN COUNTRIES AND THE UNITED STATES, SUPPLYING UKRAINE WITH MILLIONS OF TONS OF WEAPONS.br /br /IT IS NO LONGER AN OPERATION. IT IS A FULL-SCALE WAR. .../p

item.title: KREMLIN: IS THERE, FOR EUROPEANS, ON EUROPEAN SOIL, ANY GREATER EVIL THAN RUSSIA? NO. SO THIS IS A BRAINWASHING OF EUROPEAN TAXPAYERS. THEY ARE BEING 100% BRAINWASHED. WE ARE PORTRAYED AS ABSOLUTE EVI
item.description: pKREMLIN:br /br /IS THERE, FOR EUROPEANS, ON EUROPEAN SOIL, ANY GREATER EVIL THAN RUSSIA? NO.br /br /SO THIS IS A BRAINWASHING OF EUROPEAN TAXPAYERS. THEY ARE BEING 100% BRAINWASHED.br /br /WE ARE PORTRAYED AS ABSOLUTE EVIL.br /br /THE THEORY THAT THEY ARE ALL IN DANGER IS BEING PUSHED RELENTLESSLY.

item.title: R to @l2beat: On July 6, the switch flipped to a KailuaGame type - withdrawals now clear exclusively through the ZK fault-proof game. How it works: proposers lock a 0.5 ETH bond and post state roots,
item.description: pOn July 6, the switch flipped to a KailuaGame type - withdrawals now clear exclusively through the ZK fault-proof game.br /br /How it works: proposers lock a 0.5 ETH bond and post state roots, with a Vanguard EOA getting exclusive first-mover proposer rights for up to 1 month. Challenging is permis
